name: Nice (France)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic field of the County of Nice
the eagle of the County of Nice

description: A white field bearing the historic arms of the County of Nice: a red eagle on three rocks rising from the sea.
history: The flag of Nice uses the arms of the historic County of Nice (Comte de Nice), which the city continues to use as its civic emblem. The red eagle on white traces back to the late medieval county under the House of Savoy.

features.role: Red eagle of the County of Nice
features.symbolism: the historic arms of the County of Nice, in use since the late medieval period under the House of Savoy
